resources.string: NomiType Pro — Auto-Type ko text fields mein automatically messages inject karne aur Send button click karne ke liye Accessibility access chahiye. Yeh sirf user ke kehne par chalta hai aur internet par koi data nahi bhejta.
GhostType Pointer — floating pointer ki saved position par automatic tap karne ke liye gesture permission chahiye. Sirf Auto-Type ke dauran Send click karta hai, koi data read ya send nahi karta.
